description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian suspended in a highly distorted, stretched pose, as if caught in a web or net of black, glossy material. The figure's head and one arm are visible, with the rest of the body elongated and merged into the surrounding black structure, which forms angular, tent-like extensions. The head features short, curly hair and realistic facial features, while the visible arm is extended unnaturally. The black material enveloping the figure appears taut and shiny, creating a dramatic, surreal effect. The overall form is dynamic and abstract, with the pedestrian's body integrated into the web-like structure. The asset gives the impression of a person ensnared or emerging from a synthetic, flexible membrane.
description: A distorted adult pedestrian figure is entangled in a glossy, black, web-like structure, with the head and one arm visible and the rest of the body stretched and merged into the material. The scene is surreal and dynamic, with angular extensions and a dramatic, suspended pose.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso of the pedestrian are visible, emerging from the center of the black, tent-like structure, with the webbing radiating outward.
description_view_1: The side profile of the head and the elongated arm are prominent, showing the figure's body stretched horizontally within the glossy black material.
description_view_2: The back of the head and the angular, tent-like extensions of the black structure are visible, with the figure's body mostly obscured by the material.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective reveals the head and arm embedded in the black web, with the structure's angular supports and stretched surfaces clearly visible.
